category_sources: Official pandoc-plot manual describes it as a pandoc filter that generates figures from document code blocks.
source_facts.description says it renders and includes figures in Pandoc documents using plotting toolkits.
display_name_sources: Official pandoc-plot manual and repository use pandoc-plot.
docs_sources: Official laurentrdc.github.io/pandoc-plot manual is the dedicated documentation page.
repo_sources: Official pandoc-plot manual says more information is in the repository README at https://github.com/LaurentRDC/pandoc-plot.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project.
tags_sources: Official pandoc-plot manual lists supported plotting toolkits and usage as a pandoc filter for Markdown and LaTeX documents.
